title: Sign in to access the workspace
description: A returning user can sign in with valid credentials and reach the authenticated workspace.

steps.description: Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the authenticated workspace is displayed

title: Import a resume into the editor
description: A user can upload a supported resume file and see the imported profile open in the editor after parsing completes.

steps.description: Verify a loading indicator is shown while the file is parsed
Verify the editor opens with an imported profile

title: Open a saved profile from the list
description: A user can browse saved profiles and open one so it loads in the editor.

steps.description: Verify the selected profile is loaded in the editor

title: Generate a resume analysis from a loaded profile
description: This verifies that a loaded profile can be analyzed and the user can see the completed analysis results.

steps.description: Load a profile into the editor
Verify an overall score is displayed

title: Export a profile as JSON
description: This verifies that a loaded profile can be exported as a JSON file from the export panel.

steps.description: Load a saved profile into the editor
Verify the JSON export action is available for the current profile

title: Create a new account
description: A guest can create an account with valid details and see a success confirmation.

steps.description: Fill in the username field with a unique username
Fill in the email field with a valid email address
Fill in the password field with a valid password
Verify a success confirmation is visible

title: Generate a tailored cover letter from a profile
description: This verifies that a user can enter job details and generate a cover letter based on the loaded profile.

steps.description: Load a profile into the editor
Fill in the job title field with a valid role
Fill in the company name field with a valid company
Verify a generated cover letter is displayed

title: Continue as a guest
description: A guest user can continue without signing in and reach the upload or workspace area.

steps.description: Choose to continue as a guest
Verify the upload or workspace area is displayed

title: Update contact details for a loaded profile
description: A user can edit contact information in a loaded profile and save the changes successfully.

steps.description: Load a profile in the editor
Edit the name, email, phone, and location fields
Verify a success notification is visible

title: Save AI provider settings
description: This verifies that a user can choose an AI provider, enter the matching key, and save the configuration successfully.

steps.description: Verify a success notification is visible
Verify the settings remain configured after saving

title: Generate a career roadmap from a loaded profile
description: This verifies that a user can create a roadmap plan and see the resulting milestone timeline.

steps.description: Load a profile into the editor
Fill in the target role field with a valid role
Fill in the years horizon field with a valid duration
Verify a milestone timeline is displayed
Verify roadmap skills or resources are displayed

title: Request a password reset
description: A user who forgot their password can request a reset link and see a success confirmation.

steps.description: Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Verify a success confirmation is visible

title: Export a profile as CSV
description: This verifies that a loaded profile can be exported as a CSV file from the export panel.

steps.description: Load a saved profile into the editor
Verify the CSV export action is available for the current profile

title: Export a profile as PDF
description: This verifies that a loaded profile can be exported as a PDF file from the export panel.

steps.description: Load a saved profile into the editor
Verify the PDF export action is available for the current profile

title: Update the professional summary
description: A user can edit the summary text for a loaded profile and see the updated content saved with the character count refreshed.

steps.description: Load a profile in the editor
Verify a success notification is visible
Verify the updated summary character count is displayed

title: Search for job matches from a saved profile
description: This verifies that a loaded profile can be used to generate ranked job matches with visible scores and source indicators.

steps.description: Load a saved profile into the editor
Search for jobs using the profile skills
Verify a ranked list of job matches is displayed
Verify match scores and source badges are displayed

title: Add a new skill to the profile
description: This test verifies that a user can add a skill with category and experience details and see it appear in the skills list.

steps.description: Load a profile in the editor
Fill a skill name into the skill field
Fill a category into the skill category field
Fill a valid number of years of experience into the years field
Verify the new skill appears in the skills list

title: Enable local AI with Ollama settings
description: This verifies that a user can enable local AI, provide Ollama connection details, and save them successfully.

steps.description: Verify a success notification is visible
Verify local AI settings remain enabled after saving

title: Open the reset password screen from a token link
description: A reset token deep link opens the password reset view and allows the user to submit a new password successfully.

steps.description: Fill in the new password field with a valid password
Verify a success confirmation is visible

title: See logs after exporting a profile
description: A user can export a profile and confirm the export appears in the activity logs.

steps.description: Open a saved profile in the editor
Verify the export activity is displayed
Verify the export entry includes a timestamp

title: Add a new experience entry
description: This test verifies that a user can add work experience details and see the entry appear in the experience list with its bullet points.

steps.description: Load a profile in the editor
Fill a company name into the company field
Fill a role title into the role field
Fill valid dates into the date fields
Fill a location into the location field
Verify the new experience appears in the experience list
Verify the experience bullet points are displayed

title: Filter job matches by title, location, and portal
description: This verifies that job search filters narrow results while still returning matching jobs when searched again.

steps.description: Load a saved profile into the editor
Enter a job title into the job title field
Enter a location into the location field
Verify filtered job results are displayed

title: Show an error when analysis is started without an AI provider
description: This verifies that starting analysis without AI provider settings shows an error instead of running the analysis.

steps.description: Load a profile into the editor
Verify an AI provider configuration error is visible

title: See logs after importing a profile
description: A user can import a profile and then see the import recorded in the activity logs.

steps.description: Import a resume into a new profile
Verify the import activity is displayed
Verify the activity entry includes a timestamp

title: Delete a saved profile from the list
description: A user can remove a saved profile and confirm that it disappears from the saved profiles list.

steps.description: Verify the profile no longer appears in the list

title: Open a previously generated cover letter
description: This verifies that a user can review an existing saved cover letter and see its contents.

steps.description: Load a profile into the editor
Open a previously generated cover letter
Verify the selected cover letter contents are displayed

title: See logs after editing and saving a profile
description: A user can make a profile edit, save it, and confirm the edit is recorded in the activity logs.

steps.description: Open a saved profile in the editor
Edit a structured profile section and save the changes
Verify the profile edit activity is displayed
Verify the saved change is reflected in the activity history

title: Add a new project to the profile
description: This test verifies that a user can add a project with description, link, and tech stack and see it appear in the projects list.
category: Profile Editor — Projects, Education, and Certifications

steps.description: Load a profile in the editor
Fill a project name into the project name field
Fill a project description into the description field
Fill a project link into the link field
Fill a tech stack into the tech stack field
Verify the new project appears in the projects list

title: Delete a previously generated cover letter
description: This verifies that a saved cover letter can be removed from the list and no longer appears after deletion.

steps.description: Load a profile into the editor
Open a previously generated cover letter
Verify the cover letter is removed from the list

title: Save job board API credentials
description: This verifies that a user can enter job board credentials in settings and save them for future job search use.

steps.description: Verify a success notification is visible
Verify the job board credentials remain saved

title: Add a new education entry
description: This test verifies that a user can add education details and see the entry appear in the education list.
category: Profile Editor — Projects, Education, and Certifications

steps.description: Load a profile in the editor
Fill an institution name into the institution field
Fill a degree into the degree field
Fill a field of study into the field of study field
Fill valid dates into the date fields
Verify the new education entry appears in the education list

title: Open a previously generated roadmap
description: This verifies that a saved roadmap can be opened and its plan details are shown.

steps.description: Load a profile into the editor
Verify the roadmap plan details are displayed

title: See logs after generating AI content
description: A user can run an AI action and confirm it is recorded in the activity logs.

steps.description: Open a saved profile in the editor
Configure a valid AI provider in settings
Verify the AI action is displayed in the activity log
Verify the AI activity includes a timestamp

title: Delete a previously generated roadmap
description: This verifies that a saved roadmap can be deleted and no longer appears in the saved list.

steps.description: Load a profile into the editor
Verify the roadmap is removed from the list

title: See a toast after exporting a profile
description: A user can export the current profile and see a brief confirmation toast that dismisses automatically.

steps.description: Open a saved profile in the editor
Verify a success toast is visible

title: Open a job application link from matched results
description: This verifies that a user can choose a matched job and open its application page from the results.

steps.description: Load a saved profile into the editor
Search for jobs using the profile skills
Open a job match application link
Verify the application link is opened for the selected job

title: Add a social link to contact details
description: A user can add a new contact link and see it appear in the profile's link list after saving.

steps.description: Load a profile in the editor
Add a new link with a label and URL
Verify the new link appears in the list

title: See a toast after generating AI content
description: A user can generate AI-assisted output and see a brief toast confirming the action before it auto-dismisses.

steps.description: Open a saved profile in the editor
Configure a valid AI provider in settings
Verify a confirmation toast is visible

title: Add a new certification to the profile
description: This test verifies that a user can add a certification with issuer and date and see it appear in the certifications list.
category: Profile Editor — Projects, Education, and Certifications

steps.description: Load a profile in the editor
Fill a certification name into the certification field
Fill an issuer into the issuer field
Fill a valid date into the date field
Verify the new certification appears in the certifications list

title: See a toast after importing a profile
description: A user can import a resume or profile and see a brief success toast that disappears on its own.

steps.description: Import a resume into a new profile
Verify a success toast is visible

title: Review recent activity logs
description: A user can open the activity log view and review the recent history of profile actions with timestamps and details.

steps.description: Verify recent activity entries are displayed
Verify timestamps and action details are displayed

title: Close the saved profiles list and return to upload
description: A user can close the saved profiles list and return to the upload view without losing the current workspace context.

steps.description: Verify the upload view is displayed

title: Remove a skill from the profile
description: This test verifies that a user can remove an existing skill and see it disappear from the skills list.

steps.description: Load a profile in the editor
Verify the skill no longer appears in the skills list

title: Remove an experience entry from the profile
description: This test verifies that a user can remove an existing experience entry and see it disappear from the experience list.

steps.description: Load a profile in the editor
Verify the experience entry no longer appears in the list

title: Remove a contact link from a profile
description: A user can delete an existing contact link and see it disappear from the profile.

steps.description: Load a profile in the editor
Verify the link no longer appears in the list

title: See a toast after saving changes
description: A user can save profile edits and briefly see a success toast that dismisses automatically.

steps.description: Open a saved profile in the editor
Edit a structured profile section and save the changes
Verify a success toast is visible

title: Show validation for invalid login credentials
description: A user who submits invalid credentials sees an inline validation error and does not proceed into the workspace.

steps.description: Fill in the username field with an invalid username
Fill in the password field with an invalid password
Verify an inline validation error is visible

title: Remove a project from the profile
description: This test verifies that a user can remove an existing project and see it disappear from the projects list.
category: Profile Editor — Projects, Education, and Certifications

steps.description: Load a profile in the editor
Verify the project no longer appears in the projects list

title: Remove a certification from the profile
description: This test verifies that a user can remove an existing certification and see it disappear from the certifications list.
category: Profile Editor — Projects, Education, and Certifications

steps.description: Load a profile in the editor
Verify the certification no longer appears in the certifications list

title: See a toast after deleting a profile item
description: A user can delete a profile item and see a brief confirmation toast that dismisses automatically.

steps.description: Open a saved profile in the editor
